comments.text: A grumpy looking Great Blue Heron on a rock in Lake Huron at Southampton, Ontario for the #AlphabetChallenge #WeekZforZoology and for #RockinTuesday #PhotographersOfBluesky #PhotographersUnited #EastCoastKin #PhotoHour #StormHour #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife

A Great Blue Heron having a good scratch on the Lake Huron shoreline in Southampton, Ontario, is my #BirdOfTheDay I was impressed by how violently the bird was scratching that close to its eye with those claws. #EastCoastKin #PhotoHour #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography

Great Blue Heron on the Lake Huron shoreline looking grumpy because the wind is blowing its feathers #sideways #BlueSkyArtShow #PhotoHour #StormHour #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography

Today's alternative #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Breezy. A windblown Grumpy the Great Blue Heron on the Lake Huron shoreline. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #2000s #ManualFocusLens

Today's alternative #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Juveniles. A juvenile Red Knot on the Lake Huron shoreline during autumn migration. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #2000s #VintageLens #ManualFocus

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Migratory with the alternative theme #BugCatchers. A Tree Swallow in southern Ontario, Canada resting after crossing Lake Erie. It will spend the winter as far south as Central America catching bugs. #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #OldManualFocusPrimeLens
A Sanderling on a Lake Huron shoreline in Southampton, Ontario, during autumn migration for #WaderWednesday. #EastCoastKin #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography #naturephotography

Today's alternative #BirdOfTheDay theme is #RestingBeakFace. One obvious choice, Grumpy the Great Blue Heron standing on a boulder in the Lake Huron shallows at Southampton, Ontario. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #2000s #VintageLens #ManualFocus

The #time I went down to the Lake Huron shoreline for the sunrise and met Grumpy the Great Blue Heron. For the #AlphabetChallenge #WeekTForTime #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #2000s #ManualFocusLens

A juvenile Ring-billed Gull on the Lake Huron shoreline in Southampton, Ontario. My #BirdOfTheDay and #FeatheredFriday post. I'm not sure if it's yawning, calling or begging to be fed. The bright red gap is to stimulate an adult to feed the young. #EastCoastKin #birds #birdphotography #wildlife
Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #LinedUp. A female Common Merganser with young on Lake Huron. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #VintageLens #ManualFocusLens

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #RuffledFeathers. Grumpy, the windblown Great Blue Heron on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #2000s #VintageLens #ManualFocus

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #WingsOverWater. Wings and fins over Lake Huron at Southampton, Ontario. An Osprey with a freshly caught White Sucker. #BruceCounty #EastCoastKin #photography #birds #nature #wildlife
A Sanderling on the Lake Huron shoreline during autumn migration for the #SensoryArt theme #Seasons #EastCoastKin #birds #nature #wildlife #photography

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #egrets. This is a juvenile Reddish Egret in the Lake Huron shallows on the Bruce Peninsula, Ontario. It's a very long way from home. The species breeding range is the Gulf of Mexico coastline and the Atlantic coastline of Florida. I doubt it survived.

Today's alternative #BirdOfTheDay theme is #LongNecks. A Great Blue Heron demonstrates that its neck is as long as it's body. Photographed on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario on Fujichrome #Velvia. #BruceCounty #EastCoastKin #photography #birds #wildlife #PhotographersOfBluesky

#Connect2Nature Sitting by Lake Ontario on a quiet morning when a long line of Cormorants flew by. The spectacle lasted about 5 min. #BirdoftheDay theme today is timing. This is why one should always have a camera nearby. #Birds #nature #photography

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Raptors. An Osprey with a freshly caught White Sucker over Lake Huron at Southampton, Ontario. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #VintageLens #ManualFocusLens

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #MorningLight. An immature Red Knot on the Lake Huron shoreline illuminated by the rising sun. #EastCoastKin #photography #birds #birdphotography #wildlife #wildlifephotography

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #webbedfeet so here's a Semipalmated Plover on the Lake Huron shoreline during spring migration. Their common English name derives from their partially webbed feet. #EastCoastKin #PhotoHour #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography #naturephotography

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #flying to tie in with #FlyDay Friday. Here's a Caspian Tern flying along the Lake Huron shoreline fishing in the shallows at Southampton, Ontario. #FeatheredFriday #EastCoastKin #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #wildlifephotography
The #BirdOfTheDay alt theme is #Waterbirds. Here is a recent photo of migrating Willets on the south shoreline of Lake Superior. 🪶

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Snacks. A Caspian Tern flying along the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario with a snack for its mate. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #Velvia #2000s #TenMinutesFromHome #VintageLens #ManualFocus

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #GroundedGulls. "One rock each." American Herring Gulls on boulders on the Lake Huron shoreline. The alternative theme is #singing but I'm not sure complaining loudly counts as singing. #EastCoastKin #birds #birdphotography #wildlife #wildlifephotography #photography

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Pairs with the alternative theme #Gulls. A pair of Ring-billed Gulls on a boulder on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is birds standing on #rock. Here's an immature Red Knot resting on a rock on the Lake Huron shoreline during autumn migration. The bird hatched from an egg in the Arctic summer and could travel as far as the tip of South America. #EastCoastKin #birds #nature #wildlife

Ten Common Merganser, a female with nine young on Lake Huron for the #AlphabetChallenge #WeekXforX #PhotographersOfBluesky #PhotographersUnited #EastCoastKin #PhotoHour #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #SideView. An American Robin on a boulder on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario. A Fujichrome #Velvia from the early 2000s. #BruceCounty #EastCoastKin #photography #birds #nature #wildlife

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #LandMeetsWater. A juvenile Red Knot on the Lake Huron shoreline at the golden hour during autumn migration. Also a #WaterWednesday, #WaderWednesday and #WingedWednesday post. A fourfer. 😀 #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #Velvia

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #SideProfiles with the alternative theme #Robins. An American Robin on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario fulfilling both themes. A #Velvia original from the early 2000s. #BruceCounty #EastCoastKin #photography #birds #nature #wildlife

Occasionally Ruddy Turnstones are seen on the south shores of Lake Superior during their migration to or from their Arctic breeding grounds. This photo from 2023 is the one I chose for today's #BirdOfTheDay theme #SteppingOut.

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #PerfectLighting. A juvenile Red Knot on the Lake Huron shoreline in golden light shortly after sunrise. A Fujichrome #Velvia from the early 2000s. #BruceCounty #EastCoastKin #goldenhour #photography #birds #nature #wildlife

An American Crow on the Lake Huron shoreline for #ColourADay #BlueTue plus today's #BirdOfTheDay theme #SideProfiles and the alternative theme #BlackBirds. #ColorADay #EastCoastKin #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #PeacefulSolitude. A Great Blue Heron on the Lake Huron shoreline in Southampton, Ontario shortly after sunrise. A Fujichrome #Velvia from the early 2000s. #BruceCounty #EastCoastKin #photography #birds #nature #wildlife

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Speckled with the alternative #OneLeg. A juvenile Red Knot stands on one leg on the Lake Huron shoreline during autumn migration. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #OldManualFocusPrimeLens #2000s

A pair of Common Tern mating on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario for #ColourADay #BlueTue and the #SensoryArt theme #Spring. A Fujichrome #Velvia from the 2000s. #EastCoastKin #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #PhotographersOfBluesky #BlueskyPhotography

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Splash. Two American Herring Gulls taking a shower on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario. A Fujichrome #Velvia from the early 2000s. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome

Male American Robin standing on the edge of Lake Huron during spring migration. For the #BlueSkyArtShow theme #Edge. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #2000s #VintageLens #ManualFocus

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #WadersOuttaWater. A Killdeer on a sandy beach on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #VintageLens #ManualFocusLens

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #ScratchersAndPruners. An immature Red Knot having a good scratch on the Lake Huron shoreline during autumn migration. #EastCoastKin #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography

Today's alternative #BirdOfTheDay theme is #DramaQueens, upset or angry birds. An upset American Herring Gull (or Smithsonian Gull depending on who you agree with) on the Lake Huron shoreline in Southampton, Ontario. #EastCoastKin #BruceCounty #photography #birds #nature #wildlife
Two Ring-billed Gulls on a boulder on the Lake Huron shoreline for #TwosDay #PhotographersOfBluesky #EastCoastKin #photography #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #BirdsInFlight. A Caspian Tern flying along the Lake Huron shoreline carrying a small fish for its young. A Fujichrome Provia 100 from the early 2000s. #BruceCounty #EastCoastKin #photography #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife

A Sanderling on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario for #ColourADay #BlueTue and #RockinTuesday. Photographed on Fujichrome #Velvia. #BruceCounty #EastCoastKin #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #PhotographersOfBluesky #BlueskyPhotography #TenMinutesFromHome

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is attitude. A juvenile Ring-billed Gull on the Lake Huron shoreline. I'm not sure if its attitude is "feed me" or "go away" #EastCoastKin #PhotoHour #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography #naturephotography

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #PassportPhoto. A male American Robin on the Lake Huron shoreline recently arrived in Canada from the US. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #VintageLens #ManualFocus

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #JKLMNOP, bird names beginning wth those letters. Male Northern Parula. Normally a tree top species, this bird was feeding on a parking area at Point Pelee having just flown across Lake Erie on spring migration. #ECK #photography #birds #wildlife #Velvia #2000s

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Touchdown with the alternative theme #White. A male Common Tern about to land next to a female on a boulder on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #2000s #VintageLens #ManualFocus

A belligerent male American Robin on a boulder on the Lake Huron shoreline in Southampton, Ontario for the #AlphabetChallenge #WeekRforRock and the #FestiveDailyRobin. #EastCoastKin #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #wildlifephotography #photography

A relaxed immature Red Knot naps on the Lake Huron shoreline in front of the photographer for the #BlueSkyArtShow theme #relax #EastCoastKin #PhotoHour #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography #naturephotography

Today's alternative #BirdOfTheDay theme is #CourtshipOrConflict. A pair of courting Common Tern on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #VintageLens #ManualFocus

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #B&W. Having posted a full colour image earlier (😆) I thought I should post a proper monochrome image. A Ring-billed Gull greets the rising sun on the Lake Huron shoreline in Southampton, Ontario. #EastCoastKin #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography

Today's alternative #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Ardeidae, Herons and Egrets. A Great Egret flying over Lake Huron, Ontario in spring. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #VintageLens #ManualFocusLens

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #WingsWideOpen with the alternative theme #Laridae. A Ring-billed Gull patrolling the Lake Huron shoreline looking for anything edible wahed up after an overnight storm. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #Velvia #2000s #ManualFocusLens

Today's alternative #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Gulls. A Ring-billed Gull on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #2000s #VintageLens #ManualFocus

Today's alternative #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Black&White. A Caspian Tern patrolling the Lake Huron shallows in #BruceCounty, Ontario. #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #VintageLens #ManualFocus

A third #HeronsAndEgrets species for the #BirdOfTheDay theme and the alternative theme #BirdsAndRocks. A Great Egret on a rock on the Lake Huron shoreline in Oliphant, Ontario. More details in the alt text. #EastCoastKin #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography

Two juvenile Red Knot feeding on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario during the #bluehour before sunrise. For #WaderWednesday, #WaterWednesday and #WingedWednesday. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #VintageLens #ManualFocus #Provia100 #2000s

Horned Grebe in winter plumage. Dear Friends: Please remember that there is still beauty, joy and good in the world. And they will never succeed in taking that from us. Love and protect one another. #birds #nature #wildlife #Niagara #GreatLakes #photography 🪶

Redhead Duck. Wisconsin. Today's theme for #birdoftheday is #migratory. I only started photography this last fall, so I haven't seen much in the way of migrations, but I did visit Lake Michigan back in October and got a great look at this Redhead! #birds #wildlifephotography #animals #nature

Today’s #BirdOfTheDay theme is #TheGathering Images showing flocks, colonies, or communal behaviour. The alt is #LivingLandscape a single bird as part of a wider natural scene. #Birds #Gulls #ECK #LakeErie #Seascape #NaturePhotography

Herring Gull. Wisconsin. Revisiting an old favorite from Lake Michigan for today's #birdoftheday theme #wingsoverwater. It was a windy day and this gull kept trying to find a calm spot to land. #birds #wildlifephotography #animals #nature

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme: #RockSolid any bird captured, perched on or standing by rocks or on a rocky surface. Alt #mouthful any bird with a mouthful of food. Busy day, here's a gull along a Lake Huron breakwater in Michigan. #birds #birding #gull #greatlakes #photography #ECK #nature
#SilentPresence A Common Merganser taking a break on the shoreline of Lake Michigan #BirdOfTheDay
